title: Greatest common divisor (Euclid)
prompt: Write gcd(a, b) returning the greatest common divisor using Euclid's algorithm (recursive or iterative). A 2000-year-old algorithm you'll see again in CS.

details.restate: Give back the greatest common divisor of the two numbers — the largest number that divides evenly into both.

io.because: 6 divides both 48 and 18, and nothing bigger does

terms.meaning: a number that divides into another with nothing left over
